originalTitle: Atkore, Cummins, and MasTec Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the CPI report showed 4.2% annual inflation, the highest in three years, with markets fully pricing a December Fed rate hike.
content:
A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the CPI report showed 4.2% annual inflation, the highest in three years, with markets fully pricing a December Fed rate hike.

For capital-intensive industrial businesses, tighter financing conditions directly crimp investment planning and acquisition economics. The Iran conflict added supply chain pressure: Tehran targeted Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan with missile attacks, and Trump pledged mid-session to "attack very hard," sending the Dow to session lows.

What caused Cummins's recent earnings disappointment?

Why did industrial stocks fall after CPI report?

How does Iran conflict affect industrial supply chains?

Are current stock drops buying opportunities for industrials?

A widening Gulf conflict raises energy input costs and introduces uncertainty across the cross-border logistics networks that manufacturing-heavy industrials depend on. Companies with exposure to global trade flows absorbed the most pressure. Defense names within the sector remained partially insulated.

The stock market overreacts to news, and big price drops can present good opportunities to buy high-quality stocks.

Among others, the following stocks were impacted:

Electrical Systems company Atkore (NYSE:ATKR) fell 5%. Is now the time to buy Atkore? Access our full analysis report here, it’s free.

Heavy Transportation Equipment company Cummins (NYSE:CMI) fell 5%. Is now the time to buy Cummins? Access our full analysis report here, it’s free.

Engineering and Design Services company MasTec (NYSE:MTZ) fell 4.2%. Is now the time to buy MasTec? Access our full analysis report here, it’s free.

Cummins’s shares are not very volatile and have only had 8 moves greater than 5% over the last year. In that context, today’s move indicates the market considers this news meaningful, although it might not be something that would fundamentally change its perception of the business.

The biggest move we wrote about over the last year was 4 months ago when the stock dropped 12% on the news that the company reported weaker fourth-quarter results, where a significant miss on profit expectations overshadowed a revenue beat.

The company posted earnings per share of $4.27, falling 14.9% short of the $5.02 analysts had forecasted. This profit shortfall occurred despite revenue growing 1.1% year-on-year to $8.54 billion, which surpassed expectations of $8.11 billion. The lower-than-expected profitability was partly due to a decline in the company's gross profit margin, which fell to 22.9% from 25.4% in the same quarter last year. The market reacted negatively to the news, signaling that investors were more concerned with the earnings miss and contracting margins than the better-than-expected sales.

Cummins is up 21.7% since the beginning of the year, but at $635.56 per share, it is still trading 11.3% below its 52-week high of $716.45 from May 2026. Investors who bought $1,000 worth of Cummins’s shares 5 years ago would now be looking at an investment worth $2,520.

chineseTitle: Atkore、康明斯和 MasTec 股价正在下跌，您需要了解什么
chineseSummary: 在 CPI 报告显示年度通胀率为 4.2%（三年来最高）后，市场充分消化了美联储 12 月加息的影响，许多股票在下午时段下跌。
chineseContent:
在 CPI 报告显示年度通胀率为 4.2%（三年来最高）后，市场充分消化了美联储 12 月加息的影响，许多股票在下午时段下跌。

对于资本密集型工业企业来说，融资条件收紧直接抑制投资规划和收购经济。伊朗冲突增加了供应链压力：德黑兰对巴林、科威特和约旦进行导弹袭击，特朗普在会议中承诺“非常严厉的攻击”，导致道琼斯指数跌至盘中低点。

是什么导致康明斯最近的盈利令人失望？

CPI公布后工业股为何下跌？

伊朗冲突如何影响工业供应链？

目前的股价下跌是否是工业品的买入机会？

海湾冲突的扩大提高了能源投入成本，并给制造业重工业所依赖的跨境物流网络带来了不确定性。参与全球贸易流动的公司承受的压力最大。该领域内的国防名称仍然部分孤立。

股市对消息反应过度，价格大幅下跌可能是购买优质股票的好机会。

其中，以下股票受到影响：

电气系统公司 Atkore (NYSE:ATKR) 下跌 5%。现在是购买 Atkore 的时候吗？在这里访问我们的完整分析报告，它是免费的。

重型运输设备公司康明斯 (NYSE:CMI) 下跌 5%。现在是购买康明斯的好时机吗？在这里访问我们的完整分析报告，它是免费的。

工程和设计服务公司 MasTec (NYSE:MTZ) 下跌 4.2%。现在是购买 MasTec 的时候吗？在这里访问我们的完整分析报告，它是免费的。

康明斯的股价波动不大，去年仅有 8 次涨幅超过 5%。在这种背景下，今天的举动表明市场认为这一消息有意义，尽管它可能不会从根本上改变其对该业务的看法。

我们去年写到的最大波动是在 4 个月前，当时该公司公布第四季度业绩疲弱的消息，导致该公司股价下跌 12%，利润预期的大幅低于预期，盖过了收入的增长。

该公司公布的每股收益为 4.27 美元，比分析师预测的 5.02 美元低 14.9%。尽管收入同比增长 1.1% 至 85.4 亿美元，超出预期的 81.1 亿美元，但利润还是出现了缺口。盈利能力低于预期的部分原因是公司毛利率下降，从去年同期的25.4%降至22.9%。市场对这一消息反应消极，表明投资者更担心盈利低于预期和利润率收缩，而不是好于预期的销售。

自今年年初以来，康明斯股价上涨了 21.7%，但每股 635.56 美元，仍比 2026 年 5 月以来的 52 周高点 716.45 美元低 11.3%。五年前购买了价值 1,000 美元康明斯股票的投资者现在将考虑价值 2,520 美元的投资。

当你在这里时：下一个 Palantir？一家卫星公司捕获地球上每个点的图像。每一天。五角大楼想要它。对冲基金正在利用它来超越收益。你可能从未听说过它。

这就是 Palantir 在成为价值 4370 亿美元的巨头之前的早期样子。同样的剧本。不同的技术。如果你错过了 Palantir，你需要看看这个。在此免费索取股票行情。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
